Applying to 10110110
Input
0 1
1 0

7 0
Output
0 C1 = 1
1 C1 = 1
2 C1 = 1
3 NAND04 = NAND(1,0) = 1

5 NAND26 = NAND(1,1) = 0
6 NAND37 = NAND(1,0) = 1
7 OR-NOT40 = OR(0,NOT(1)) = 0

\boxed{11111010}
